reviews.comment:
Difícil acceso, ya que está en pleno centro, muy chica y los empleados del servicompra atienden muy mal, un consejo para esos muchachos, si no les gusta el laburo busquense otra cosa pero al cliente no le hagan perder el tiempo.

(Translated by Google)
Difficult to access, as it's right in the center, very small, and the convenience store employees provide terrible service. A word of advice to those guys: if you don't like the job, find something else, but don't waste the customer's time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtblB2bkh3EAE

reviews.comment:
